title: AUDITS BIOSECURITE (PAR LES PROFESSIONNELS) FOCUS SUR LES INTEGRATIONS
description: This document examines biosecurity audits conducted by integrated poultry companies in Italy, outlining the organization of vertically integrated production chains and the roles of company veterinarians and technicians. It details the evaluation processes, policies, and corrective actions used during professional audits to ensure compliance in poultry farming operations.
